name: Slop Guard
description: Score text 0-100 for formulaic AI writing patterns. Powered by slop-guard (pure regex, no API calls).

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://files.pythonhosted.org; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; default-src 'self'
